## Source: amazon-inspector (f27caad6b59388e38056a6d8624f8f7b19441cee52bd007d0e1b3678e36dd240)
The package puzzle-gateway was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c633c6144aa3625797f8dd7e8392fc2d9676eb98ecc60a1fc09c35c290ed1ef4)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'puzzle-gateway' @ 2.4.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
